- [x] Clarify Project Requirements. Completed: Project is a basic minimalist React frontend for a video sharing application.

- [x] Customize the Project. Completed: Customized App.jsx with a minimalist video sharing UI including header, navigation, and video grid with mock data.

- [x] Install Required Extensions. Completed: No extensions specified for Vite project.

- [x] Compile the Project. Completed: Installed dependencies with npm install, no errors found.

- [x] Create and Run Task. Completed: No custom tasks needed; standard npm scripts available.

- [x] Launch the Project. Completed: Started the Vite development server in background.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete. Completed: README.md created with project info. Copilot-instructions.md updated with completion status.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
